design_philosophy: Fiverr-like marketplace structure but infused with warm, premium, trust-first healthcare aesthetics. Emphasizes safety, trust, and human connection through organic spacing, serif typography, and earthy pastel tones. No technical or sterile clinical looks.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2d5038]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-serif font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2d5038]
hierarchy.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-serif font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2d5038]
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#4a7c59]

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[#4a7c59] text-white px-8 py-3.5 font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#3e694a] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4a7c59] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#faf8f4]
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[#e8c4b0] text-[#2d5038] px-8 py-3.5 font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#dcb29a] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#e8c4b0] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#faf8f4]
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-[#4a7c59] text-[#4a7c59] px-8 py-3.5 font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#4a7c59]/5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4a7c59] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#faf8f4]

cards.provider_gig: bg-[#fffef9] rounded-[14px] overflow-hidden border border-[#e2e8e4]/50 shadow-[0_2px_20px_rgba(74,124,89,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_6px_25px_rgba(74,124,89,0.12)] cursor-pointer group flex flex-col h-full
cards.category: bg-[#fffef9] rounded-[14px] p-8 border border-[#e2e8e4]/50 shadow-[0_2px_20px_rgba(74,124,89,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_6px_25px_rgba(74,124,89,0.12)] hover:border-[#4a7c59]/30 text-center

inputs.default: w-full rounded-xl border border-[#e2e8e4] bg-[#fffef9] px-4 py-3 text-base text-[#2d5038] placeholder-[#7a9383] focus:border-[#4a7c59] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4a7c59] transition-colors

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-[#4a7c59]/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-[#4a7c59]

homepage.hero: Split layout or rich background. If using image background, use bg-black/30 overlay max. High typography contrast. Use 'hero_care' image.
homepage.stats_bar: Horizontal bar with subtle bg-[#e8c4b0]/20, 3-4 key trust metrics (e.g., '10k+ Verified Providers', '4.9/5 Average Rating').
homepage.categories: Grid of services (Elderly Care, Nursing, Child Care, Physiotherapy). Use category cards.
homepage.featured_providers: Bento or grid of top-rated professionals. Emphasize their photo, rating, and specialized skills.
homepage.how_it_works: 3-step visual process. Use soft blush accents.
homepage.testimonials: Warm, story-driven quotes. Serif font for quotes.
homepage.recruitment_banner: Dark sage background (#2d5038), offering contrast, inviting professionals to join.

category_page.layout: Sidebar for filters (Price, Availability, Specialty, Rating), main area for grid of provider cards.
category_page.cards: Provider Gig cards showing price, title, location, and rating.

service_listing_page.layout: Fiverr-style. Main left column for details, about provider, reviews. Right sticky sidebar for 'Booking Widget' (pricing, schedule, CTA).

provider_profile.layout: Profile header with photo and verified badge. Tabs below: 'Services/Gigs', 'About', 'Reviews'. Soft cream background.

booking_flow.layout: Clean, distraction-free layout. 3-step stepper (Service Details -> Date/Time -> Confirm). Centered forms.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='book-service-btn'

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind config to include the custom colors exactly as specified.
2. Set the global background color to #faf8f4.
3. Apply Lora for headings and DM Sans for body globally in your CSS.
4. Build the site prioritizing warm, generous padding. Cards must use 14px border radius and specific custom shadow rules.
5. Follow the Fiverr marketplace structure but do not use harsh borders or tech-centric UI patterns.
6. Build out the required pages: Homepage, Category Page, Service Listing, Provider Profile, and Booking Flow using React Router.
8. Make sure all images use the exact URLs provided in this JSON.
